question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. You'll receive a password reset link via email. Follow the instructions to create a new password.

question: What is two-factor authentication?
answer: Two-factor authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security by requiring a second verification method (like a code sent to your phone) in addition to your password.

question: How do I update my email address?
answer: You can update your email address in Account Settings under 'Profile Information'. Click on the edit icon next to your email and enter your new address.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our customer support is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. We offer 24/7 automated support through our chatbot and help center.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Please note this action is irreversible and all your data will be permanently removed.

question: How can I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach customer support via email at support@company.com, live chat on our website, or call us at 1-800-555-0123 during business hours.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers. All payments are processed securely.

question: How do I change my subscription plan?
answer: Navigate to Billing > Subscription Settings. Select 'Change Plan' to view available options. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.

question: Is my data secure?
answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption (AES-256) for data storage and SSL/TLS for data transmission. We are GDPR and CCPA compliant.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: Go to Settings > Privacy > Export Data. You'll receive a downloadable link via email within 24 hours containing all your data in JSON format.

question: What is your refund policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all annual plans. Monthly plans can be cancelled anytime with no refund for partial months.

question: How do I enable notifications?
answer: Go to Settings > Notifications to customize your notification preferences. You can enable email, SMS, or in-app notifications.

question: Can I use the service on mobile?
answer: Yes! Our platform is fully responsive and works on all mobile devices. We also have native iOS and Android apps available for download.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Navigate to Team > Invite Members. Enter email addresses and assign roles. Invited members will receive an email with joining instructions.

question: What is the difference between Basic and Premium plans?
answer: Basic plan includes core features with 5GB storage. Premium adds advanced analytics, priority support, unlimited storage, and team collaboration tools.

question: How do I integrate with other tools?
answer: Go to Integrations in your dashboard. We offer pre-built connections with popular tools like Slack, Zapier, Salesforce, and Microsoft Teams.

question: What happens if I miss a payment?
answer: If a payment fails, we'll retry for 5 days. After that, your account will be downgraded to a limited free tier. You can update payment info anytime.

question: How do I set up API access?
answer: API keys can be generated in Developer Settings. We provide comprehensive API documentation with code examples in Python, JavaScript, and other languages.

question: What is your uptime guarantee?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for all paid plans. Current status and incident history are available on our status page at status.company.com.

question: How do I report a bug?
answer: Please report bugs through our support portal or email bugs@company.com. Include steps to reproduce, screenshots, and your browser/OS information.

question: Can I get a custom domain?
answer: Yes, custom domains are available on Business and Enterprise plans. Go to Settings > Domain to configure your custom domain.

question: How do I schedule reports?
answer: Navigate to Analytics > Scheduled Reports. Set your preferred frequency (daily, weekly, monthly) and recipients. Reports will be automatically emailed.

question: What training resources are available?
answer: We offer video tutorials, documentation, live webinars, and a knowledge base. Check our Learning Center for self-paced courses and certification programs.

question: How do I use dark mode?
answer: Click on your profile avatar and select 'Dark Mode' from the theme options. Dark mode reduces eye strain in low-light environments.

question: What are the system requirements?
answer: Our web app works on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest versions). For desktop app, Windows 10+ or macOS 10.14+ with 4GB RAM minimum.

question: How do I track user activity?
answer: Go to Analytics > User Activity Log. You can filter by date, user, action type, and export logs for audit purposes.

question: Can I whitelabel the platform?
answer: Yes, whitelabeling is available on Enterprise plans. You can replace our branding with your own logo, colors, and custom domain.

question: How do I set up SSO?
answer: SSO is available for Enterprise customers. Contact our sales team to configure SAML 2.0 or OAuth2 integrations with your identity provider.

question: What is your data retention policy?
answer: We retain active data indefinitely. Deleted data is permanently removed after 30 days. Backups are kept for 90 days for disaster recovery.

question: How do I participate in beta features?
answer: Opt-in to beta features in Settings > Preferences. Beta features give early access to upcoming functionality but may have occasional bugs.
